sn45.21:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you wrongness and rightness. Listen to that … .sn.v.18
sn45.21:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is wrongness? It is: wrong view … wrong concentration. This is called wrongness.
sn45.21:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is rightness? It is: right view … right concentration. This is called rightness."
